message:
fix(wezterm): coalesce CLI list_panes calls with 500ms cache

In CLI-only mode (no vendored backend), discovery, snapshot engine, and
watchdog each independently call list_panes(), spawning a separate
`wezterm cli list --format json` subprocess per call.  Under sustained
load this can overwhelm the mux and cause it to become unresponsive
until service restart.

Add a time-windowed cache: the first CLI call within a 500ms window
populates the cache; subsequent callers return the cached result.
This reduces subprocess pressure by ~3x without affecting correctness
(pane topology doesn't change faster than ~1s in practice).

The vendored/mux-pool path is untouched — the cache only applies to
the CLI subprocess fallback.

Fixes #40.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
